ticket.title: Build full-text search for candidates
ticket.description: Implement candidate search over name, role, and notes using Postgres full-text search, with pagination and ranking.

candidate_memory.link_reason: the edge cases this ticket must cover

code_agent.rationale: Code needs the edge cases (draft is fine for agents), the search impl, architecture, and the perf budget. The agent_run summary and scratch are out of code scope (and the scratch is private); workspace conventions are out of scope. Personas is in scope but only loosely relevant to building search — optional.

qa_agent.rationale: QA verifies the edge cases against the impl, architecture, and perf budget; agent_run entries, personas (project), and conventions (workspace) are all out of scope.

design_agent.rationale: Design sees the ticket's edge cases, personas, and conventions; all codebase and agent_run entries are out of scope.

product_agent.rationale: Product sees the ticket, personas, and conventions; codebase and agent_run entries are out of scope.

human_teammate.rationale: Alice sees every team-visible entry including the agent's team-shared run summary; only the agent's private (local) scratch is invisible.
